description: valbur trade & investment ltd., dba valbur, is a romanian company specialized in facilitating global trade and investment, with a focus on the physical movement of industrial, petroleum, building materials, and beverages, as well as cereals and vegetable oils. the company operates internationally, serving clients in the industrial, petroleum, construction, and beverage sectors, and provides services such as aligning suppliers and buyers, managing transactions, and offering financial solutions.
core_offerings: Beverage and Food Products Logistics Management

description: brasov industrial portfolio is a romanian company specialized in the provision of production and logistics facilities, with a focus on high-tech solutions for economic development and logistics efficiency in the brasov region. the company serves industries such as automotive, construction, consumer goods, and e-commerce, and operates facilities that include airport logistics and smart city logistics hubs. its operations are supported by technologies such as automatic plate scanning, automatic weigh-in stations, and rfid systems, with a primary emphasis on last-mile logistics and urban warehousing.

colaska inc. is an american construction company engaged in the construction and maintenance of transportation infrastructure, including roads, air, rail, and maritime transport systems, as well as urban development projects and recreational facilities. the company also operates as a gravel mining company and manages a fleet of mobile hot mix asphalt plants to support its operations across alaska. colaska is a subsidiary of the colas group and is part of the colas usa companies. the company is a member of professional organizations such as the associated general contractors, alaska miners association, and the resource development council, and is involved in community support initiatives.
core_offerings: Rail Transport Infrastructure Construction and Maintenance
Hot Mix Asphalt Production and Delivery
Air Transport Infrastructure Construction and Maintenance
Maritime Transport Infrastructure Construction and Maintenance

description: brand industrial services, inc., known as brandsafway, is an american company that provides industrial, commercial, and infrastructure sector services, including scaffolding systems, shoring, fireproofing, and forming and shoring solutions. the company also offers industrial services, maintenance and refurbishment support, and new construction and expansion solutions. brandsafway operates a global network with locations in 25 countries and serves industries such as oil and gas, power generation, civil and infrastructure, and commercial construction. the company utilizes digital planning and management platforms, a supply chain and logistics network, and maintains an ehs management system to support its operations.
core_offerings: 3D Integrated Design and Virtual Planning Services
Power Protection Platform Supply and Installation
Suspended Access System Supply and Installation

primary_naics.label: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: fluor corporation is an american engineering, procurement, and construction company that provides engineering, procurement, construction, maintenance, and project management services. the company operates in sectors such as energy, infrastructure, chemicals, government, life sciences, manufacturing, mining and metals, and technology. fluor also offers architecture and planning, civil engineering, design, and technical services, as well as environmental services, logistics and supply chain management, and program management. the company serves clients in over 60 locations worldwide and is certified for its operations.
industry_name: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

primary_naics.label: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: kiewit corporation is an american construction and engineering company that provides engineering, construction, procurement, and development services for sectors including transportation, water and wastewater, power, oil, gas, chemical, building, industrial, marine, and mining. the company also offers building information modeling, construction management, and self-performed project scopes. kiewit operates through a network of subsidiaries and offices in the united states, canada, mexico, and alaska, and is involved in infrastructure development and sustainability initiatives.
core_offerings: Engineering, Procurement, and Construction Project Delivery
industry_name: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: lemartec corporation, dba lemartec, is an american construction management and general contracting company specialized in industrial, aviation, power, and large commercial projects. the company operates as a vertical construction arm of mastec, serving clients across north america and the caribbean. lemartec is also involved in sustainability and environmental responsibility, with participation in leed-certified projects.

clayton homes, inc. is an american construction company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and construction of single-family homes, including manufactured, modular, and site-built options. the company also provides home insurance, financing, and energy-efficient and zero energy ready home solutions. clayton homes operates through multiple business units, including technology, home building, retail, logistics, mortgage and finance, insurance, and construction services. the company is a registered trademark of the manufactured housing institute and is part of the berkshire hathaway group.

primary_naics.label: Power and Communication Line and Related Structures Construction

description: quanta services, inc. is an american corporation that provides infrastructure contracting and engineering services for the electric power, renewable energy, communications, pipeline, and industrial sectors. the company delivers integrated solutions in planning, design, installation, maintenance, and repair of energy and communications infrastructure, including transmission and distribution lines, substations, and utility systems. its operations also encompass engineering, procurement, construction (epc) services, program management, emergency restoration, and environmental pipeline and industrial project management. quanta services serves clients in the united states, canada, australia, and select international markets, and is publicly traded on the new york stock exchange.
core_offerings: Heavy Lift and Aerial Work Services
Fiber Optic Network Installation and Maintenance
Carbon Capture and Biofuel Plant Construction
industry_name: Power and Communication Line and Related Structures Construction

description: bnbuilders, inc., dba bnbuilders, is an american construction company specialized in commercial building solutions for sectors including life sciences, education, healthcare, public, corporate, technology, hospitality, and residential. the company provides services such as preconstruction, alternative delivery methods, lean construction, virtual design & construction (vdc), sustainable construction practices, vendor diversity, and self-perform work. bnbuilders serves clients across the pacific northwest, california, colorado, and beyond, and is a member of industry associations such as dbia, leed ap, and ispe.

primary_naics.label: Electrical Contractors and Other Wiring Installation Contractors

description: emcor group, inc. is an american company that operates in mechanical and electrical construction, industrial and energy infrastructure, and facilities management. the company provides services such as building services, hvac systems, life safety and fire protection, and security solutions. emcor group also supplies solar energy equipment and is involved in the planning, installation, operation, and maintenance of facility systems, including electrical, mechanical, lighting, air conditioning, heating, and power generation. the company serves a diverse client base, including businesses, organizations, hospitals, education facilities, and government sectors, and operates in both the united states and the united kingdom.
core_offerings: Facility Security System Installation and Maintenance
Life Safety System Installation and Maintenance
Fire Protection System Installation and Maintenance
industry_name: Electrical Contractors and Other Wiring Installation Contractors

description: skanska ab is a swedish construction and development company engaged in project development, construction, and development services for residential, commercial, and infrastructure projects. the company operates primarily in the united states and serves a diverse range of clients across various sectors. skanska also functions as an energy engineering and contractor, and is involved in civil engineering activities. its operations are supported by a global supply chain and logistics network.

primary_naics.label: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: bechtel corporation is an american engineering, procurement, construction, and project management company. the company provides services in energy engineering, nuclear technology, defense, and environmental markets, serving sectors such as energy, infrastructure, manufacturing, mining, and national security. bechtel also operates as a contractor and offers specialized centers of excellence for welding, applied technology, and lng technology. its operations are supported by a global supply chain and a network of offices and subsidiaries in multiple regions.
core_offerings: Defense and National Security Infrastructure Services
industry_name: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: halmar international, llc is an american construction company engaged in heavy civil infrastructure projects, including aviation, bridge, highway, tunnel, transit, and rail works. the company provides engineering, design, construction, finance, operation, and maintenance services for transportation infrastructure, with a focus on public-private partnership (p3) projects. halmar international also offers environmental and general contracting services, and is involved in industrial and commercial construction. the company operates internationally, with offices in the united states, italy, and brazil, and is affiliated with the astm group and the gavio group.

f-c construction llc, dba focus civil construction group, is a united states construction management, design-build, and general contracting company specialized in commercial, industrial, and residential construction projects. the company provides project management, construction consulting, architecture, building, tiling, painting, interior design, and renovation services, serving a global clientele across various industries. it also operates as a provider of sustainability and supply chain management solutions, utilizing technologies such as trade credit policy and procedures.

tutor perini corporation is an american construction company engaged in civil, building, and specialty construction services. the company provides general contracting, project management, engineering, equipment manufacturing, federal prime contracting, green building, remote construction, self-performed services, surety services, and virtual design and construction. tutor perini serves a wide range of markets, including aviation, infrastructure, commercial, education, government and military, healthcare, hospitality and gaming, justice, manufacturing and industrial, mixed-use and retail, public assembly and entertainment, rail and mass transit, recovery and restoration, residential, science and technology, sports, tunnels and mines, and water. the company is a member of the national association of construction managers (nacm) and the american institute of constructors (aic).

trusted solutions group inc., dba trusted solutions group, is an american construction services company specialized in labor staffing, general contracting, and materials management and logistics. the company serves construction, government, and private sector clients, with a focus on providing flexible labor solutions, certified flaggers, and material sourcing for dc residents and hubzone areas. trusted solutions group is an sba certified hubzone business and a dc cbe, and is committed to compliance with first source requirements, hubzone regulations, and cbe participation.

dpr construction, inc. is an american general contractor and construction management company engaged in technically complex and sustainable construction projects. the company serves markets including technology, healthcare, higher education, life sciences, commercial, hospitality, manufacturing, and office sectors, with a global presence in the united states, south america, europe, and asia. dpr construction also operates as a provider of construction management, building information modeling, and integrated project delivery services, and is involved in the design and construction of mission critical and data center projects.

csi compass is a british engineering company engaged in meph engineering services for the uk construction industry. the company provides commissioning management, testing, diagnostics, tender and pre-design consultancy, design, construction, handover, and facility management. csi compass also offers energy-efficient solutions, leed certification support, and dynamic energy simulations, serving major construction firms and residential developers. the company is iso certified and is a member of several industry groups, including csa, acg, interneta, leed, nebb, bsria, ashrae, aee, and aqap.

auratech engineering is an italian engineering studio specialized in the design and implementation of electrical and electronic systems for industrial, civil, and tertiary sectors. the company provides services including construction management, cost control and monitoring, smart building systems, structured cabling, integrated security, fire and evacuation systems, lightning risk assessments, and photovoltaic systems. auratech engineering also offers solutions for smart home and building automation, serving a range of building types and activities.

terzic urban engineering is a swiss company specialized in urban engineering solutions, including the design of road, highway, and railway networks, as well as sustainable public transport system development. the company also provides planning and management for private, public, and slow traffic, and offers services in traffic moderation, road safety solutions, and parking and rest area planning. terzic urban engineering serves the ticino region and beyond.
core_offerings: Private and Public Traffic Planning and Management
Traffic Moderation and Road Safety Solutions

description: ma-engineering gmbh, dba ma-engineering, is a swiss engineering company specialized in sustainable construction projects. the company provides tailored electrical and lighting planning, photovoltaic solutions, and other engineering services for clients in the construction and project management sectors, with a focus on sustainability and efficiency.

primary_naics.label: Administrative Management and General Management Consulting Services

description: energi og byggestyring aps, dba energi og byggestyring, is a danish company specialized in environmental-friendly construction management and project planning. the company provides comprehensive project planning, execution, and coordination, including handling insurance claims, selecting skilled craftsmen, and managing renovation and maintenance projects. it also offers algae removal services for buildings and other surfaces, and conducts environmental screening to ensure proper disposal of construction waste. energi og byggestyring serves both private and commercial clients, including housing associations and businesses, primarily in the copenhagen metropolitan area, sjælland, and the central and northern jutland regions.
core_offerings: Environmental Screening and Waste Disposal Services
industry_name: Administrative Management and General Management Consulting Services

description: archipel bouwadvies is a dutch company engaged in sustainable building advice and energy efficiency solutions, serving small and medium-sized entities in the construction and energy efficiency sectors. the company provides a four-step process for sustainable building maintenance, including initial consultation, architectural research, decision-making, and project execution. archipel bouwadvies also offers project management, coordination with contractors and installers, quality control, and assistance with subsidy and financing applications. its services are primarily focused on clients in the netherlands.

mcr proyectos is a chilean company specialized in engineering and construction services for civil infrastructure projects, with a particular focus on hydroelectric power plants. the company provides project management, energy project review, construction and execution of civil works, environmental management, feasibility studies, design and planning of civil works, advisory services for energy generation projects, structural engineering, topography, and reconfiguration. mcr proyectos serves clients in the mining, energy, industrial, and real estate sectors, offering tailored solutions for infrastructure projects. the company employs certified personnel in all services and emphasizes strategic, technical, and logistical project management.
core_offerings: Hydroelectric Power Plant Engineering and Construction
